home.title: Smart Ticket
home.subtitle: Streamline your healthcare support with intelligent ticket routing, real-time SLA monitoring, and comprehensive analytics.
home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to manage healthcare support efficiently
home.feature1Desc: Create, track, and manage support tickets with priority levels, categories, and SLA tracking.
home.feature2Desc: Seamless communication between users and operators with comments, internal notes, and ticket history.
home.feature3Desc: Comprehensive dashboards with charts, SLA monitoring, and operator performance metrics.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.healthTicketDesc: Streamlined healthcare support with smart ticket management and real-time tracking.
auth.registerDesc: Create your account to start managing healthcare support tickets efficiently.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

tickets.title: My Tickets
tickets.noTicketsDesc: No tickets match the selected filter.
tickets.noTicketsHint: Try changing the filter or create a new ticket
tickets.createSubtitle: Fill in the details below to submit a support ticket
tickets.fileTypes: PDF, images or documents up to 10MB

rating.title: Rate Your Experience
rating.subtitle: How would you rate the operator's assistance?
rating.commentsPlaceholder: Tell us more about your experience...

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Overview of your healthcare support system
admin.recentActivityDesc: Recent ticket updates and assignments will appear here.

guide.title: How It Works
guide.subtitle: Learn how to use HealthTicket effectively
guide.step1Desc: Sign up with your email to get started. You'll be assigned a user role by default.
guide.step2Desc: Describe your issue, choose a category and priority level. Our system will automatically set SLA targets.
guide.step3Desc: Follow your ticket's progress, communicate with operators through comments, and rate the service once resolved.
guide.roleUserDesc: Can create tickets, post comments, and rate operator assistance on closed tickets.
guide.roleOperatorDesc: Can manage tickets, change status, assign tickets, and post internal comments.
guide.roleAdminDesc: Full access including analytics dashboard, user management, and all operator capabilities.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.deleteWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted.
profile.confirmDelete: Type your password to confirm deletion
